Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all cases

Name: Number of times SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion is performed
Percentage of cases where SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion is immediately followed by Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion appearing as the first activity in a case variant
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion occurrences that are not followed by SW-Checklist Completed within the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all cases where 'SW-Checklist Completed' does not happen

Name: Ratio of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to SW-Checklist Completed across all cases
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Percentage of variants that include SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion relative to the total number of unique variants
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all cases

Name: Number of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion events that occur before any plagiarism-related activity (e.g., Plagiarism Originality Report Completed or Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' activities for cases where activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion instances that lead to eventual rejection outcomes (e.g., SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion in cases that undergo multiple revision cycles (e.g., involving RW-Initial Reviewer Selection or RSW-Initial Reviewer Selection)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all 'RW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion events that are followed by a checklist reminder activity (e.g., SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days or SW-Checklist Completion now due)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days'

Name: Ratio of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to Manuscript Export Succeeded in the initial submission phase
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Number of cases where SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion appears more than once
Percentage of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion occurrences that precede reviewer assignment activities (e.g., SW-AE Assign Reviewers or SW-Initial Reviewer Selection)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion in cases that ultimately reach acceptance (e.g., SW-EIC Accept or RW-EIC Accept)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'
